nasb.text: And he ordered them to be baptized in the name of Jesus Christ. Then they asked him to stay on for a few days.

esv.text: And he commanded them to be baptized in the name of Jesus Christ. Then they asked him to remain for some days.

cnv.text: 就吩咐他們奉耶穌基督的名受洗。後來，他們請彼得住了幾天。

ccb.text: 彼得吩咐他们奉耶稣基督的名受洗。之后，他们又请彼得住了几天。

csbs.text: 他就吩咐他们奉耶稣基督的名受洗；然后他们请求彼得在那里多住几天。
